design_philosophy: Premium Night-time / Bioluminescent Luxury. A highly cinematic, dark-first application leveraging deep space backgrounds, crisp glassmorphic panels, and neon-lit magenta/purple gradients that glow rather than overwhelm. This evokes the excitement of a night flight or neon city exploration while maintaining high-end SaaS legibility.

hierarchy.small_label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-mono font-medium text-purple-400

surfaces_and_glassmorphism.active_glow_border: relative before:absolute before:-inset-[1px] before:rounded-xl before:bg-gradient-to-r before:from-[#FF00FF] before:to-[#8A2BE2] before:-z-10 before:blur-sm

layouts.landing_hero: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 items-center min-h-[90vh] pt-24 px-6 md:px-12. Hero text spans col-span-1 to 7, dramatic floating images span col-span-8 to 12.
layouts.dashboard_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6 md:p-8
layouts.itinerary_timeline: relative pl-8 before:absolute before:inset-y-0 before:left-[15px] before:w-[2px] before:bg-gradient-to-b before:from-[#FF00FF] before:to-[#8A2BE2]/20. Day cards stack vertically with generous gap-8.
layouts.chat_assistant: Flex column layout with glassmorphic input area pinned to bottom. User bubbles: bg-white/10. AI bubbles: bg-gradient-to-br from-[#8A2BE2]/20 to-[#FF00FF]/20 border border-purple-500/30.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-gradient-to-r from-[#FF00FF] to-[#8A2BE2] text-white px-8 py-3 font-body font-semibold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,0,255,0.3)] hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(255,0,255,0.6)] hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white px-8 py-3 font-body font-semibold hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all
buttons.icon_button: p-3 rounded-full bg-white/5 border border-white/10 hover:bg-purple-500/20 hover:border-purple-500/50 hover:text-[#FF00FF] transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-[#15151D]/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF00FF]/50 focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-white/30
components.budget_chart: Recharts PieChart using colors: ['#FF00FF', '#8A2BE2', '#B266FF', '#FF66FF']. Center text showing total budget.
components.day_card: Shadcn Accordion component heavily customized to remove default underline. Uses glass_card surface.

motion.page_transition: Framer Motion: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4, ease: 'easeOut' }}
motion.staggered_list: Framer Motion: variants for container (staggerChildren: 0.1) and items (opacity: 0, y: 20 -> opacity: 1, y: 0)

testing_attributes.requirement: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute.

image_urls.description: Luxurious tropical resort with swimming pool and palms at dusk

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts: 'Clash Display', 'Manrope', and 'Azeret Mono'.
Install and use 'lucide-react' for all icons.
Install 'framer-motion' and use it for page transitions, timeline card entrances, and glass card hover states.
Install 'recharts' for the budget planner. Use the specified magenta and purple colors for the pie slices.
Implement the background using a deep '#0B0B0F' color. Do not use pure black.
For the Timeline: Implement a vertical line on the left side of the day cards. Use Shadcn Accordion for expandable Morning/Afternoon/Evening details.
Never use raw transparent backgrounds for the sticky header; always use the specified 'glass_header' class.
Apply 'data-testid' to absolutely every form input, select menu, button, and accordion trigger for automated testing.
Ensure dark mode text contrast is accessible by strictly using '#FFFFFF' for primary text and '#A0A0AB' for secondary text.
When displaying background images (e.g., hero_background), use an overlay gradient or absolute div with 'bg-black/60' to ensure the white text on top remains highly legible.
